title: AI-Snake visual and chat config persistence per user/project
purpose: Ensure that AI-Snake visual and chat settings are always saved per user/project immediately on change and guaranteed on exit (Ctrl-Q).
goal: Persist every AI-Snake configuration change into a JSON file stored either under ~/.anana/user.json or <Project>/user.json for the current user, so that reopening the TUI or project restores all previous settings automatically.

context.user_goal: Die letzten Einstellungen im AI-Snake Config sollen sofort gespeichert werden, und spätestens beim Beenden mit Ctrl-Q muss user.json aktuell sein.
current_observations: ai_snake_config_view.py exposes the settings and applies them in memory.
Currently settings are volatile per session and not written immediately to a file.
There is an existing save_tui_chat_settings function but it may not persist all AI-Snake visual settings or per-project paths immediately.
Need to support per-user and per-project paths, respecting home directory (~/.anana/user.json) or project folder (<Project>/user.json).
context.design_decision: Introduce a UserConfigManager to handle atomic read/write of JSON settings. On any change, write immediately. On Ctrl-Q (TUI exit), flush all cached settings to disk. Merge new changes safely if multiple settings change in a batch.
required_features: Immediate write on any setting change
JSON schema includes visual AI-Snake settings, chat backend, CodeCompass, recent chat history and rolling summary configs

tasks.title: Define JSON schema for per-user/project AI-Snake config
acceptance_criteria: Schema includes visual AI-Snake settings, chat backend, CodeCompass, recent chat history, rolling summary configs.
Schema works for per-user and per-project files.
Schema is validated before write.

tasks.title: Implement UserConfigManager read/write API
acceptance_criteria: Read merges defaults, user.json, and project.json correctly.
Write serializes to JSON safely.
Handle errors, logs, and fallback to safe location.

tasks.title: Hook immediate write on any AI-Snake config change
acceptance_criteria: Any change in ai_snake_config_view.py triggers UserConfigManager write.
Partial changes in batch do not corrupt JSON.
Changes are immediately visible on reload.

tasks.title: Merge visual and chat settings into user.json correctly
acceptance_criteria: Visual AI-Snake settings and chat backend settings are persisted together.
Overrides per project respected.
No data loss for previous settings.

tasks.title: Flush all pending settings on Ctrl-Q exit
acceptance_criteria: Ctrl-Q triggers UserConfigManager flush.
All unsaved changes written to JSON.
Exit sequence does not block longer than reasonable timeout.

tasks.title: Integrate flush into TUI exit handler
acceptance_criteria: interactive.py Ctrl-Q handler calls flush.
No exceptions if user.json or project.json missing or unwritable.
Exit sequence completes cleanly.

tasks.title: Unit tests for UserConfigManager read/write
acceptance_criteria: Read/write round-trips work for user.json and project.json.
Simulate concurrent write and check atomicity.
Handle missing or corrupted JSON gracefully.

tasks.title: Integration tests for config changes
acceptance_criteria: Changing any AI-Snake visual or chat setting triggers immediate JSON write.
Reload TUI restores settings correctly.

tasks.title: Document user.json persistence behavior
acceptance_criteria: Docs describe per-user and per-project paths.
Docs explain immediate write on change and flush on Ctrl-Q.
Docs describe schema and settings included.
